description: An Impressionist landscape depicting a boatyard along a riverbank at Saint-Mammes. In the foreground, a grassy slope leads down to the water's edge where wooden structures of a boatyard stand on stilts. Several tall poplar and birch trees rise behind the buildings, their foliage rendered in loose, dappled brushstrokes. Across the river, a hillside with scattered buildings is visible. The sky is filled with soft, broken clouds in blues, whites, and lavenders. The overall palette is fresh and naturalistic, capturing the quality of outdoor light characteristic of Sisley's plein-air practice.
